headline: ThredUp CEO targets eBay in push to become resale 'super app'
summary: Over the last few years, there’s been a substantial increase in the number of consumers shopping for secondhand apparel. Where used clothing was once viewed as a badge of inferiority, it’s now become a mainstream consumer preference. In fact, ThredUp’s 2026 Resale Report predicts that the ...
